Name: DAMAGE_PARAM
Description: Defines attack damage behavior, hit detection, collision settings, special effects, knockback, and damage interaction rules.

Fields.Name: Damage Category
Fields.Description: Category type used to classify the damage behavior.

Fields.Name: Child Damage ID
Fields.Description: Reference ID for an additional or chained damage entry triggered by this attack.

Fields.Name: Damage Group ID
Fields.Description: Group identifier used for shared damage interaction logic.

Fields.Name: Damage Value: 1
Fields.Description: Primary damage value dealt by the attack.

Fields.Name: Damage Value: 2
Fields.Description: Secondary damage value dealt by the attack.

Fields.Name: Damage Value: 3
Fields.Description: Tertiary damage value dealt by the attack.

Fields.Name: Minimum Guaranteed Damage
Fields.Description: Minimum amount of damage guaranteed regardless of defenses or scaling.

Fields.Name: Damage Attribute: 1
Fields.Description: Primary damage attribute type used by the attack.

Fields.Name: Damage Attribute: 2
Fields.Description: Secondary damage attribute type used by the attack.

Fields.Name: Damage Attribute: 3
Fields.Description: Tertiary damage attribute type used by the attack.

Fields.Name: Final Damage %
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to the attack's final damage.

Fields.Name: Counter Damage %
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier applied when hitting a target during a counter state.

Fields.Name: Stamina Damage
Fields.Description: Amount of stamina removed from the target on hit.

Fields.Name: Durability Damage
Fields.Description: Amount of equipment durability damage inflicted.

Fields.Name: Knockback Distance [m]
Fields.Description: Distance the target is pushed back by the attack.

Fields.Name: Stagger Duration [sec]
Fields.Description: Duration of hitstun or stagger caused by the attack.

Fields.Name: Source Type
Fields.Description: Type of dummy polygon used as the attack origin.

Fields.Name: Source Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Dummy polygon ID used as the attack origin point.

Fields.Name: Attack Motion Attribute
Fields.Description: Motion attribute type associated with the attack.

Fields.Name: Shape Type
Fields.Description: Shape used for hit detection collision.

Fields.Name: Radius [m]
Fields.Description: Radius of the attack hitbox.

Fields.Name: Length [m]
Fields.Description: Length of the attack hitbox.

Fields.Name: Continuous Hit Interval
Fields.Description: Controls repeated hit detection behavior.

Fields.Name: Downed Attack Flag
Fields.Description: Determines whether the attack can hit downed targets.

Fields.Name: Single Target Flag
Fields.Description: Restricts the attack to hitting only one target.

Fields.Name: Allow Owner Hit
Fields.Description: Determines whether the attack can hit its owner.

Fields.Name: Allow Friendly Hit
Fields.Description: Determines whether the attack can hit allies.

Fields.Name: Allow Enemy Hit
Fields.Description: Determines whether the attack can hit enemies.

Fields.Name: Allow Neutral Hit
Fields.Description: Determines whether the attack can hit neutral entities.

Fields.Name: Allow Map Hit
Fields.Description: Determines whether the attack can collide with map geometry.

Fields.Name: Allow Object Hit
Fields.Description: Determines whether the attack can collide with objects.

Fields.Name: Knockback Direction
Fields.Description: Controls the direction targets are pushed when hit.

Fields.Name: Guard Detection Direction
Fields.Description: Direction used when determining guard effectiveness.

Fields.Name: Hit Vertical Position
Fields.Description: Vertical hit position category used for reaction logic.

Fields.Name: Forced Hit Angle XZ
Fields.Description: Horizontal angle applied to the hit reaction.

Fields.Name: Forced Hit Angle Y
Fields.Description: Vertical angle applied to the hit reaction.

Fields.Name: Character Group Check
Fields.Description: Enables damage group checks for characters.

Fields.Name: Map Group Check
Fields.Description: Enables damage group checks for map geometry.

Fields.Name: Object Group Check
Fields.Description: Enables damage group checks for objects.

Fields.Name: Special Effect ID: On Hit
Fields.Description: Special effect applied when the attack hits.

Fields.Name: Special Effect Target
Fields.Description: Target affected by the special effect triggered on hit.

Fields.Name: Special Effect Management Category
Fields.Description: Category used for managing special effect application.

Fields.Name: Special Effect Duplication Check
Fields.Description: Controls whether duplicate special effects can stack.

Fields.Name: Material Size
Fields.Description: Size category used for material impact effects.

Fields.Name: Material
Fields.Description: Material type used for impact effects and sounds.

Fields.Name: Trail SFX
Fields.Description: Visual trail effect used by the attack.

Fields.Name: Trail SFX Dummy Poly Color
Fields.Description: Color category for the trail effect attachment point.

Fields.Name: Trail SFX Position
Fields.Description: Position setting for the trail effect.

Fields.Name: Overkill Launch Speed [m/sec]
Fields.Description: Initial launch speed applied when overkilling a target.

Fields.Name: Movement Power
Fields.Description: Movement power parameter type used for knockback calculations.

Fields.Name: Attack Type %
Fields.Description: Multiplier category applied based on attack type.

Fields.Name: Stance %
Fields.Description: Multiplier category applied based on weapon handling style.

Fields.Name: Event Damage
Fields.Description: Determines whether the damage is treated as event-related.

Fields.Name: Deflection Hit Source Type
Fields.Description: Dummy polygon type used for deflection hit calculations.

Fields.Name: Deflection Hit Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Dummy polygon ID used for deflection hit calculations.

Fields.Name: Deflection Hit Shape Type
Fields.Description: Collision shape type used for deflection hit detection.

Fields.Name: Forced Damage Override
Fields.Description: Overrides the normal damage reaction behavior.

Fields.Name: Disable Invincibility Flag
Fields.Description: Allows the attack to ignore invincibility states.

Fields.Name: Disable Map Floor Deflection
Fields.Description: Prevents the attack from being deflected by map floors.

Fields.Name: Disable Map Wall Deflection
Fields.Description: Prevents the attack from being deflected by map walls.

Fields.Name: Disable Object Deflection
Fields.Description: Prevents the attack from being deflected by objects.

Fields.Name: Enable Door Check
Fields.Description: Determines whether the attack checks for door collisions.

Fields.Name: Disable SFX Scaling
Fields.Description: Disables scaling of visual effects with attack size.

Fields.Name: Deflection Hit Radius [m]
Fields.Description: Radius of the deflection hitbox.

Fields.Name: Deflection Hit Length [m]
Fields.Description: Length of the deflection hitbox.

Fields.Name: Grab Parameter ID
Fields.Description: Reference ID for grab or throw behavior parameters.

Fields.Name: Expansion Size [m]
Fields.Description: Maximum expanded size of the attack hitbox.

Fields.Name: Expansion Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Time required for the hitbox expansion to complete.
